g.data-narration: Welcome to exploring the diverse applications of blockchain technology beyond cryptocurrency.
Blockchain provides trust, transparency, and security without intermediaries, enabling new possibilities across sectors.
Smart contracts are self-executing programs stored on blockchain that automatically enforce agreement terms when conditions are met.
Financial services include cryptocurrencies, cross-border payments, DeFi, and asset tokenization enabling faster, cheaper transactions globally.
g.text: ✓ Reduced fees • ✓ 24/7 operation • ✓ Financial inclusion • ✓ Faster settlement (minutes vs days)

g.data-narration: Supply chain applications track products from manufacture to consumer, verifying authenticity and ensuring ethical sourcing.
g.text: 📦 Example: Walmart tracks food products from farm to shelf • Diamond provenance tracking

g.data-narration: Healthcare applications secure patient records, enable drug traceability, and ensure clinical trial data integrity.
g.text: Benefits: Patient privacy • Interoperability • Reduced medical errors

g.data-narration: Government applications include digital identity, voting systems, land registries, and transparent public record management.
IP applications protect creators through copyright, NFTs, automated royalties, and transparent content licensing.
Energy applications enable peer-to-peer trading, carbon credit markets, and renewable energy certificate verification.
g.text: Example: Brooklyn Microgrid - residents trade solar energy using blockchain

g.data-narration: Education applications provide tamper-proof credentials, instant verification, and student-owned academic records.

svg.g:
7. Education & Credentials

Eliminates fraud • Reduces verification time from weeks to seconds </g
8. Real Estate
🏠 Digital Titles Immutable ownership records
🤝 Smart Contracts Automated escrow and transfer
👥 Fractional Ownership Multiple investors own shares
⚡ Days vs Months 💰 Lower costs
9. Insurance
🤖 Automated Claims Smart contracts trigger payment when conditions met
🔍 Fraud Detection Shared database prevents duplicate claims
⚡ Parametric Insurance Auto payouts based on predetermined triggers
